3247700.name: The Blackwood Legacy
3247700.description:
Unravel a Dark Family Secret

You play as the only son of Johnathan Blackwood, and heir to the family legacy. After your father mysteriously disappears, you are forced to enter his study and soon uncover a maze of hidden rooms and cryptic puzzles that reveal your family’s dark secrets. 

Experience Atmospheric Horror

Experience immersive horror as you navigate through a labyrinthian manor filled with intricate puzzles and chilling atmospheres. Every shadow and every room could hold a clue or a threat. Decipher the clues left behind by your father and unlock the mysteries that will lead you to the truth.

Solve Twisted Puzzles

Discover the secrets of Blackwood Manor by solving intricate, mind-bending puzzles woven into the fabric of the house itself. Every hidden chamber and ancient artifact holds a clue. Uncover the ritual tablets, align sacred symbols, and decipher cryptic riddles. With each puzzle solved, you’ll unlock deeper mysteries and draw closer to the truth.

Survive the Supernatural

The dark being tied to your family is not just a memory. It lurks, waiting for a chance to break free. As you explore the manor, you must avoid its growing influence, gather items for protection, and use your wits to survive its ever-present danger.
3247700.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
